9734248239.title: Plan Houston and New Orleans Expansion
9734248239.whyItMatters: Having a clear strategy for adding new locations helps Google understand your service areas and improves local search rankings.

9761982969.whyItMatters: Proper tracking setup helps measure which marketing efforts bring visitors to your website.

9765435933.whyItMatters: Mentioning all service locations on main pages helps Google show your business to customers in those areas.

9707669010.title: Add Houston Address to Footer
9707669010.whyItMatters: Displaying your business address helps Google verify your location and improves local search visibility.

9650510647.title: Add Second Checkbox to Forms
9650510647.whyItMatters: Proper form consent helps with legal compliance and ensures your lead generation continues working smoothly.

9644623592.title: Remove Duplicate St. Francisville Location
9644623592.whyItMatters: Fixing duplicate location listings prevents confusion for both Google and potential customers.

9686137878.whyItMatters: Removing broken code improves your website's appearance and user experience, which Google rewards with better rankings.

9644098259.title: Prepare SEO Analysis Demo
9644098259.whyItMatters: Demonstrating advanced SEO analysis tools helps explain how we'll improve your website's search performance.

9644645225.title: Create Priority Location Service Pages
9644645225.whyItMatters: Dedicated pages for each service area help you rank higher in local searches for those specific locations.
